action.hypothesis: The straightforward gated hyperparameter sweep has now produced only clean regressions, so the next informative move is to recover the blocked incubating family rather than spend another round on weak local tuning. `factorized_topk` still has no usable quality signal because its only attempt failed at sanity. A narrow architecture-compatibility fix inside `sparsify/` should let the same K=128 proxy prototype run and finally reveal whether extra encoder mixing can improve over plain top-k.
action.summary: Fix the `factorized_topk` implementation so it passes sanity, then rerun the same K=128 proxy prototype under the current strongest signum regime.
action.self_review: This is the smallest informative next step because the mainline gated sweeps are exhausted and the incubating family has not yet produced a valid proxy result. The main risk is spending another round on implementation recovery, but one clean run is necessary before deciding whether to stabilize or retire the family.
notes_to_memory: The recent gated stabilization sweeps at lower LR and lower expansion both regressed cleanly, so obvious one-parameter tuning on the best family looks locally exhausted.
`factorized_topk` remains unresolved because its only prototype attempt failed at sanity, which should be treated as an implementation blocker rather than an architecture-quality result.
This round keeps the original `factorized_topk` K=128 proxy target fixed and changes only the code required to make the family compatible with the existing sanity and training path.
next_hypotheses: If the repaired `factorized_topk` run completes and beats plain `topk`, keep the family alive and stabilize its internal factorization width or activation design next.
If the repaired run completes normally but remains far behind gated, retire shallow factorization and move to a different encoder-expressivity direction.
If `factorized_topk` still fails sanity after the focused fix, conclude that this prototype path is not presently viable in the stack and shift effort elsewhere.
